description: (Note: Please do not play forcing moves K17, K16, J14, L14.) This problem was flawed when I first posted it a few months ago, and I finally got around to fixing and reposting it. Thanks to cae for pointing out the mistake! Edit: The clear rate is low, but if you're careful, you can solve this.
